title: Blue Number 3 Shaped Large Foil Balloon (86cm) 1 Piece - Perfect for Birthday Parties and Special Events
features: • Large Number Balloon measures 34" (86cm) when fully inflated with air or helium (ships uninflated)
• Ideal for a boys 3rd birthday party, or combined with other number balloons for a milestone birthday party or anniversary party
• Combine with latex balloons and curling ribbon to create a balloon bouquet or table decoration
• Coordinate with other blue birthday decorations and party supplies from Unique Party
description: From the manufacturer Giant Blue 34" Foil Number Balloons Make no mistake where the celebrations begin with these Giant Blue Foil Number Balloons! These balloons are ideal to show off your birthday age, anniversary year or new year in eye catching fashion and fit any party with a blue motif! Don't forget the balloon weights and ribbon!
